dialogueChunks.intro: Justice is served, {player_name}. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} been dealt with, and the {quest_stakes} can begin to heal.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: What they did to the {quest_focus} can be rebuilt. What matters is that the wrong has been answered. {quest_ally} says the settlement sleeps easier knowing someone held them accountable.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did not let a crime go unanswered. That takes conviction.

playerResponses.text: No one should get away with harming innocents.
It is done. Let us move on.
Make sure it does not happen again.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the nightmare is over. You managed to {quest_action}, and the {quest_threat} will answer for what they did.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_focus} still bears the scars, but the people are stronger for having seen justice. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_has} been restored as much as possible.
dialogueChunks.outro: Vengeance can be a poison of its own, but what you brought us was not vengeance: it was justice. Thank you.

playerResponses.text: There is a difference between justice and revenge. I am glad we found it.
Just be sure the next generation learns from this.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is finished, {player_name}. The {quest_threat} can no longer harm the {quest_stakes}. The crime has been answered.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} has already begun restoring the {quest_focus}. The mood in the settlement has shifted: people feel safer, more confident. Your actions made that possible.
dialogueChunks.outro: You stood up when others looked away. That is the mark of a true ally.

playerResponses.text: Wrongs should not go unanswered. It was the right thing to do.
I expect you will remember this next time I need something.
Stay watchful. Grudges have long memories.
